error.signature: EsRejectedExecutionException: rejected execution of coordinating operation [coordinating_and_primary_bytes=0, replica_bytes=0, all_bytes=0, coordinating_operation_bytes=xxxx, max_coordinating_and_primary_bytes=xxx]

verdict.summary: Thread pool queue is full, rejecting new operations. Indexing or search rate exceeds cluster capacity.

dead_ends.action: Increase thread pool queue size to a very large value
dead_ends.why_fails: Large queues just delay rejection while consuming more heap memory. The real issue is ingestion rate exceeding throughput.

dead_ends.action: Set refresh_interval=-1 to speed up indexing
dead_ends.why_fails: Disabling refresh makes recently indexed docs invisible to search and does not address queue capacity

workarounds.action: Implement client-side backoff and retry on 429/rejected responses
workarounds.how: Catch 429 TOO_MANY_REQUESTS and retry with exponential backoff; bulk API returns per-item status

workarounds.action: Reduce bulk request size and concurrent bulk threads
workarounds.how: Start with 5-15 MB bulk size and 1-2 bulk threads per node; increase gradually while monitoring rejections

workarounds.action: Scale out by adding data nodes to distribute load
workarounds.how: More shards across more nodes increases write throughput linearly
